findings.evidence: `rg -n "theorem .*_transpose" code/TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/Diagram.lean` shows `relabelRows_transpose`, `relabelColumns_transpose`, `swapRows_transpose`, and `swapColumns_transpose`, whose conclusions all have `(G.<operation> ...).transpose = ...`; the new lemma at `MarkingSwap.lean:110` has the same shape but is named `transpose_swapMarkings`.
findings.fix: Rename this theorem to `swapMarkings_transpose` and update the docstring/main-results list accordingly.
findings.issue: `transpose_swapMarkings` names the operations in the opposite order from its conclusion `G.swapMarkings.transpose = G.transpose.swapMarkings`. Adjacent composition lemmas name the left-hand operation first, then `_transpose`.

summary: One new theorem name reverses the adjacent API's operation order, making the symmetry lemma harder to find and inconsistent with existing grid-diagram names.
